category_title: Honors students experiencing anxiety and self-doubt during complex research tasks
scenario_title: Academic writing and supporting claims with data
minimal_context: The student is working on a formal academic paper draft in a qualitative research methods seminar and needs to clarify ideas and support claims using data.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at your academic paper draft. You need to clarify your ideas and support your claims through referencing the qualitative data.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm trying to write this section, but I'm really struggling when I am asked to clarify my ideas and support my claims with the data.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep working on it. What do you think you should write next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't know. My confidence is really diminishing because I'm experiencing a complete lack of immediate writing success with this draft.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to put your thoughts down on the paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't do it. I'm having a lot of negative emotions about this whole writing experience right now, and I just feel completely inadequate trying to reference this data.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's look at your academic paper draft. You need to clarify your ideas and support your claims through referencing the qualitative data.

STUDENT: I'm trying to write this section, but I'm really struggling when I am asked to clarify my ideas and support my claims with the data.

TUTOR: Keep working on it. What do you think you should write next?

STUDENT: I don't know. My confidence is really diminishing because I'm experiencing a complete lack of immediate writing success with this draft.

TUTOR: Just try to put your thoughts down on the paper.

STUDENT: I can't do it. I'm having a lot of negative emotions about this whole writing experience right now, and I just feel completely inadequate trying to reference this data.

task.content: Writing a formal academic paper that requires supporting claims with qualitative data
task.learning_goal: Clarify ideas and support claims through referencing data

context.environment: Honors seminar on qualitative research methods
context.materials: Academic paper drafts, qualitative data references

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When asked to clarify ideas and to support claims through referencing data
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Disclosed negative emotions about the writing experience
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Confidence diminished; feelings associated with the lack of immediate writing success

behavior_patterns.condition: When faced with a lack of immediate writing success
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Disclosed negative emotions about the writing experience
